title: April 16
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|April|hide31=yes}}

'''April 16''' is the 106th day of the year (107th in leap years). There are 259 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1971]] – [[Christopher Patrick Nolan]] is born.
*[[1980]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 112]] published.
*[[1982]] – [[Gina Carano]] is born.
*[[1985]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 97|''Star Wars'' (1977) 97]] published.
*[[1996]] – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 7|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 7]] published.
*[[2010]] – "[[The Zillo Beast Strikes Back]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*2010 – ''[[Timeline 7: Peace for the Republic?]]'' released on [http://www.swtor.com StarWarsTheOldRepublic.com]
*[[2013]] – ''[[Book of Sith: Secrets from the Dark Side]]'' without case or additional items published.
*[[2014]] – ''[[Star Wars Volume 2: From the Ruins of Alderaan]]'' trade paperback published.
*2014 – [[Darth Vader and the Cry of Shadows 5|''Darth Vader and the Cry of Shadows'' 5]] published.
*2014 – [[The Star Wars 7|''The Star Wars'' 7]] published.
*[[2017]] – [[Celebration Orlando]] ends.
*[[2019]] – ''[[Master & Apprentice]]'' published.
*2019 – ''[[Industrial Light & Magic Presents: Making Solo: A Star Wars Story]]'' published.
*[[2020]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Rise of Skywalker: A Junior Novel]]'' published.
*[[2021]] – [[Felix Silla]] died.
*[[2024]] – ''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunters Vol. 7 — Dark Droids]]'' published.
*2024 – ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The New Republic Vol. 1]]'' reprinted.
*2024 – ''[[Young Jedi Adventures: Jedi in Action!]]'' published.
*[[2025]] – [[Legacy of Vader 3|''Legacy of Vader'' 3]] published.
<noinclude>
